name: mcp-music-studio
description: MCP music composition server — multi-instrument playback, style presets, note highlighting, and AI-friendly reference guides. Fork of @modelcontextprotocol/server-sheet-music.
author: Xule Lin

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && bun build server.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun build main.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --external "./server.js" --banner "#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development bun run build && bun run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development bun run build 1>&2 && bun run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "bun run watch" "bun run serve"
